adjudication.adjudicator_rationale: The evidence directly states carrying cost stayed within a declared limit. Interpreting that declared limit as the management-set target threshold is a reasonable bridging inference within the same case context, so option 1 is better supported than treating the management-threshold detail as unsupported scope expansion.

selected_frozen_decision.support_rationale: Claim-008 requires carrying cost to remain under a 'target threshold set by management'. Evidence px_10_support_1 notes cost stayed within its 'declared limit'. In the context of the case, a 'declared limit' is reasonably inferred to be the management-set target threshold, making the claim supported by the evidence.
